Every blocking pre-merge gate re-run LIVE and green: smoke 2/0 (exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit clean (exit 0), secret-redaction 5/0 (exit 0), hermetic e2e 3/0 (exit 0), bare `bun test` (CI) 102 pass / 2 skip / 0 fail (exit 0). Slice hermetic (no Cue/network/mic/key) and traverses transcript->decision->trace with non-empty correlationId. PASS.
